metadata.description: Game encyclopedia data endpoints for World of Tanks Console API
metadata.note: These endpoints provide access to game encyclopedia data including vehicles, achievements, maps, modules, and crew information
metadata.live_discrepancies_note: The live console API deviates from the official docs in several places. Endpoints below carry a 'live_discrepancies' field where behavior was verified to differ (verified 2026-07-16). Also note: the PC-style module methods /wotx/encyclopedia/guns|engines|radios|suspensions|turrets/ do NOT exist on the console API (METHOD_NOT_FOUND) — use /wotx/encyclopedia/modules/ with its type parameter instead.

live_discrepancies: A 'type' filter parameter is NOT supported — it is silently ignored (all vehicles are returned, no error). Filter by vehicle type client-side.
When page_no is omitted, the API returns ALL vehicles (~1273) in one response despite meta.limit reporting 100; pagination only kicks in when page_no is passed explicitly.

fields.description: Response field. The fields are separated with commas. Embedded fields are separated with dots. To exclude a field, use '-' in front of its name. In case the parameter is not defined, the method returns all fields. Maximum limit: 100.

language.description: Localization language. Valid values: en, ru, pl, de, fr, es, tr.

limit.description: Number of returned entries (fewer can be returned, but not more than 100). If the limit sent exceeds 100, a limit of 100 is applied (by default).

encyclopedia_achievements.description: Returns list of awards, medals, ribbons.

category.description: Filter by award category. Maximum limit: 100. Valid values: 'achievements' — Achievements, 'ribbons' — Ribbons

fields.description: Response field. The fields are separated with commas. Embedded fields are separated with dots. To exclude a field, use '-' in front of its name. In case the parameter is not defined, the method returns all fields. Maximum limit: 100.

language.description: Localization language. Valid values: en, ru, pl, de, fr, es, tr.

fields.description: Response field. The fields are separated with commas. Embedded fields are separated with dots. To exclude a field, use '-' in front of its name. In case the parameter is not defined, the method returns all fields. Maximum limit: 100.

language.description: Localization language. Valid values: en, ru, pl, de, fr, es, tr.

encyclopedia_modules.description: Returns list of available modules that can be installed on vehicles (engines, guns, radios, suspensions, turrets).
live_discrepancies: The 'type' parameter's actual valid values are: vehicleGun, vehicleEngine, vehicleRadio, vehicleChassis, vehicleTurret. The documented values (engine, gun, radio, suspension, turret) return INVALID_TYPE (407).
Undocumented 'nation' and 'tier' filter parameters ARE supported and work.
Response entries have no price_xp or price_gold field; actual fields are module_id, name, nation, tier, type, weight, price_credit, image, tanks (list of tank_ids the module fits), era.
When page_no is omitted, all matching modules (~6500 unfiltered) are returned in one response.

fields.description: Response field. The fields are separated with commas. Embedded fields are separated with dots. To exclude a field, use '-' in front of its name. In case the parameter is not defined, the method returns all fields. Maximum limit: 100.

language.description: Localization language. Valid values: en, ru, pl, de, fr, es, tr.

limit.description: Number of returned entries (fewer can be returned, but not more than 100). If the limit sent exceeds 100, a limit of 100 is applied (by default).

type.description: Module type. Valid values: engine, gun, radio, suspension, turret

live_discrepancies: Only one role exists on console ('commander'). The role tag is the data KEY — entries contain only 'name' and 'skills', there is no 'role' field inside the entry.
Each skill entry has is_perk (boolean), name, description, and images.large — richer than the documented 'associative array'.

fields.description: Response field. The fields are separated with commas. Embedded fields are separated with dots. To exclude a field, use '-' in front of its name. In case the parameter is not defined, the method returns all fields. Maximum limit: 100.

language.description: Localization language. Valid values: en, ru, pl, de, fr, es, tr.

role.description: Crew role. Valid values: commander, gunner, driver, radioman, loader

encyclopedia_info.description: Returns general information about the Tankopedia.
live_discrepancies: Actual response fields are: game_version, vehicle_nations, vehicle_types, achievement_sections (each section: {name, order}). The documented tanks_updated_at and vehicle_crew_roles fields do NOT exist — requesting them via 'fields' returns INVALID_FIELDS (407).
Some vehicle_nations values can be null (e.g. 'xn', 'switzerland') — fall back to the nation key for display.

fields.description: Response field. The fields are separated with commas. Embedded fields are separated with dots. To exclude a field, use '-' in front of its name. In case the parameter is not defined, the method returns all fields. Maximum limit: 100.

language.description: Localization language. Valid values: en, ru, pl, de, fr, es, tr.

encyclopedia_vehicle_upgrades.description: Returns list of equipment and consumables.
live_discrepancies: 'tank_id' is REQUIRED (undocumented) — omitting it returns TANK_ID_NOT_SPECIFIED (402). Upgrades are returned per vehicle.

Response is keyed by tank_id, each entry containing 'equipment' and 'consumables' dicts keyed by equipment_id. Item fields: equipment_id, name, description, price_credit, price_gold, image (may be null).
The 'type' filter accepts 'equipment' or 'consumables' (plural, as documented).
Consumable descriptions embed color markup like $(col:aeff01)...$(col:end) — strip it for display.

fields.description: Response field. The fields are separated with commas. Embedded fields are separated with dots. To exclude a field, use '-' in front of its name. In case the parameter is not defined, the method returns all fields. Maximum limit: 100.

language.description: Localization language. Valid values: en, ru, pl, de, fr, es, tr.

type.description: Equipment type. Valid values: equipment, consumables

encyclopedia_vehicle_characteristics.description: Returns vehicle configuration characteristics based on the specified module IDs.

engine_id.description: Engine ID. If module is not specified, standard module is used by default.

fields.description: Response field. The fields are separated with commas. Embedded fields are separated with dots. To exclude a field, use '-' in front of its name. In case the parameter is not defined, the method returns all fields. Maximum limit: 100.

gun_id.description: Gun ID. If module is not specified, standard module is used by default.

language.description: Localization language. Valid values: en, ru, pl, de, fr, es, tr.

profile_id.description: Configuration ID. If specified, parameters of IDs of separate modules are ignored.

radio_id.description: Radio ID. If module is not specified, standard module is used by default.

suspension_id.description: Suspension ID. If module is not specified, standard module is used by default.

turret_id.description: Turret ID. If module is not specified, standard module is used by default.
